title: SLR-RFF-BRICK: Probabilistic sea-level rise from RFF-SP × FaIR × MimiBRICK
description: Reproducible pipeline for probabilistic sea-level rise projections, coupling the RFF-SP socio-economic / emissions ensemble (Rennert et al. 2022) with FaIR v2.2.4 (FaIR-calibrate v1.4.1 posterior, Smith et al. 2024) and MimiBRICK, importance-weighted against observed historical GMSL via Wong (2026) AR(1) likelihood. Includes the LHS-10k conditional-BRICK final ensemble (10,000 LHS triplets with Wong importance weights, ESS = 7,037 / 10,000) plus Hawkins-Sutton variance decomposition of total and pulse-marginal SLR by source.

creators.name: Sarofim, Marcus
creators.affiliation: NYU Marron Institute of Urban Management / Johns Hopkins EPCP
